description_long: This is a medium-sized civilian helicopter with a streamlined, dark green fuselage and a black nose. The helicopter features a large main rotor with two long, slender blades and a smaller tail rotor mounted on the tail boom. The cockpit is equipped with multiple rectangular windows, providing ample visibility for the pilot and passengers. The landing gear consists of two sturdy, curved skids attached to the underside of the fuselage with crossbars for stability. White accent stripes run along the sides, adding a touch of contrast to the otherwise dark exterior. The overall design suggests a utility or transport role, suitable for urban or suburban environments.
description: A dark green civilian helicopter with a black nose, two-blade main rotor, tail rotor, and rectangular cockpit windows. It features white accent stripes and sturdy landing skids.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the helicopter, main and tail rotors, cockpit windows, and landing skids.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail boom, tail rotor, and the symmetry of the landing skids.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other side of the fuselage, rotors, and skids.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the cockpit windows, black nose, and the alignment of the main rotor blades.
attribute_rotor_blades: Two long, narrow main rotor blades, likely made of composite or metal, colored dark gray or black with no visible markings.
attribute_tail_rotor: A two-blade tail rotor mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom, colored dark gray or black, with no visible protective shroud.
attribute_landing_skids: Two curved, tubular metal landing skids painted dark gray or black, connected by crossbars for stability.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Four rectangular cockpit windows, two on each side, with a slight tint and black framing, providing wide visibility.
